primitive_families.name: copy_rename
primitive_families.description: Single-field direct mapping with no structural composition.

primitive_families.name: type_normalization
primitive_families.description: Single-field mapping with cast or normalization.

primitive_families.name: projection
primitive_families.description: Select the right source fields among distractors.

primitive_families.name: split_merge
primitive_families.description: One source field to many targets or many sources to one target.

primitive_families.name: join
primitive_families.description: Combine 2+ source objects into one target object.

primitive_families.name: aggregation
primitive_families.description: Summarize multiple source records into one target field or object.

primitive_families.name: nested_extraction
primitive_families.description: Extract values from nested JSON structures.

primitive_families.name: derived_field
primitive_families.description: Compute target field from multiple inputs.
